title: Query results in SR087 and Virtuoso crash
description:
Virtuoso 7 fd9fea9
Query:
SELECT  ?s (sum(?o) AS ?sum)
WHERE
  { ?s ?p ?o }
GROUP BY ?s
LIMIT   100

Results in:
Virtuoso 22003 Error SR087: Non numeric argument(s) to arithmetic operation '+'.

SPARQL query:
define sql:big-data-const 0
# output-format:text/html

define sql:signal-void-variables 1 SELECT  ?s (sum(?o) AS ?sum)
WHERE
  { ?s ?p ?o }
GROUP BY ?s
LIMIT   100
And Virtuoso crashes.
Apparently, this query is used by https://github.com/pyvandenbussche/sparqles
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, value VARCHAR, amount FLOAT);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value, amount) VALUES (1, 'test', 'non-numeric');
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value, amount) VALUES (2, 'example', NULL);
SELECT value, SUM(amount) AS total_amount FROM test_table GROUP BY value LIMIT 10;
SELECT value, SUM(COALESCE(amount, 0)) AS total_amount FROM test_table GROUP BY value LIMIT 10;
key_bug_features: Non numeric argument(s) to arithmetic operation in query
